summary: Iteration 16 testing complete. All new features verified working: (1) GlobalHeader component visible on /blog, /b2b, /blog/:slug pages with nav links (Sauny, Balie, Blog, B2B) and phone number +48 732 099 201, (2) Back arrow navigates to main page /, (3) B2B link highlighted green (#34D399) on main landing, (4) Blog has 14 published articles with correct category counts (Sauny 7, B2B 4, Balie 3), (5) B2B page has updated hero 'Sauny dla hoteli, pensjonatów i ośrodków SPA', 8 benefits, financial section with stats (+100-150 zł, 85-90%, 12-18 months, +3000 zł), financing/leasing section, 'Dlaczego WM Group?' with 7 checkmarks, contact form. WhatsApp floating button visible on all pages.

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Verified existing 14 blog articles and B2B settings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested GlobalHeader component on Blog/B2B/article pages, B2B link green highlight on main landing, 14 blog articles (Sauny 7, B2B 4, Balie 3), B2B page enriched content (hero, 8 benefits, financial stats, leasing section, 'Why WM Group' 7 checkmarks, contact form). GlobalHeader has data-testid='global-header', back arrow has data-testid='global-header-back', nav links have data-testid='global-nav-{path}', phone has data-testid='global-header-phone'. B2B page sections have data-testid='b2b-hero', 'b2b-benefits', 'b2b-financial', 'b2b-financing', 'b2b-contact'. WhatsApp button visible on all pages (green circle bottom-left).
